diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,138 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class, type exports (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, Context, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point file that re-exports Hono class and all public types from internal modules
+- Copy-safe detail: Entry re-export file for the Hono package, delegates all exports to ./hono and ./types
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Type exports (Bindings, Variables, BlankEnv, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, HandlerResponse, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface)
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, Context, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, MergePath, MergePath functions, RouterRoute, Response, TypedResponse, ResponseFormat
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions file containing Env, Handler, RouterRoute, and other TypeScript types for Hono
+- Copy-safe detail: Type-only file with extensive type definitions for the Hono type system and handler signatures
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class implementation extending HonoBase with router setup, exports as primary package entry point
+- Copy-safe detail: Single Hono class constructor with optional router and options, delegates to HonoBase, SmartRouter factory with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class (exported as HonoBase), get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire methods
+- Internal names noticed: notFoundHandler, errorHandler, GetPath type, HonoOptions type, MountOptionHandler type, MountReplaceRequest type, MountOptions type, Hono class, _basePath, #path, routes, #clone, #notFoundHandler, errorHandler, #dispatch, #handleError, COMPOSED_HANDLER utility
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono framework class with routing, middleware, error handling, and fetch/request methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Full HonoBase implementation with methods for HTTP verbs, middleware (use), routing (get/post/etc, on, use, route, basePath), error/404 handling, mount for sub-apps, fetch as main entry, request for testing
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond interfaces, TEXT_PLAIN constant, Context class instance
+- Internal names looked up: Result from ./router, types from ./types (Env, FetchEventLike, H, Input, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, TypedResponse), ResponseHeader and BaseMime from ./utils/headers, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase and resolveCallback from ./utils/html, ContentfulStatusCode RedirectStatusCode StatusCode from ./utils/http-status, InvalidJSONValue IsAny JSONParsed JSONValue from ./utils/types
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request/Response context class providing c.req, c.env, c.executionCtx, c.res, c.header, c.status, c.set, c.get, c.var, c.body, c.text, c.json, c.html, c.redirect, c.notFound, c.render, c.newResponse methods
+- Copy-safe detail: Class with private fields for raw request/variables/status/res/match-result/path, public getters setters for req/res/event/execCtx/var, response methods (body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound), render method with layout support
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest function, param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, url, method, routePath, matchedRoutes properties/methods
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT constant, Input, InputToDataByTarget, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, RouterRoute, ValidationTargets, GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol, Body, BodyCache, Body class, RequiredRequestInit, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, ParseBody, HonoRequest class, InputToDataByTarget, Input, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, ValidationTargets, Params, RouterRoute
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper class exposing path, query, queryparams, header, body parsers (json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData, parseBody), valid, url, method, routePath, matchedRoutes, plus cloned raw request utility
+- Copy-safe detail: Request handling class with decoded params/queries, caching body reads to support body cloning, passthrough validation data, url/method/routePath/matchedRoutes getters, cloneRawRequest reconstructs request if body cached
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: BodyData type, ParseBodyOptions type, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue type, ParseBody interface/function
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: FormData body parsing with support for arrays (via [] suffix) and nested objects (via dot notation), returns parsed BodyData type
+- Copy-safe detail: parseBody function checks Content-Type for multipart/form-data or x-www-form-urlencoded, delegates elsewhere to return empty object, parseFormData converts form entries, handles all/dot options for arrayization/nesting
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, Error
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition using koa-compose pattern, wraps array of [handler, param] and [middleware, param] tuples, manages index, dispatch, next, error/notFound handlers, sets context.res, returns composed middleware
+- Copy-safe detail: compose takes middleware array, optional onError, onNotFound, returns function taking context and next option, returns promise resolving to Context, dispatch maintains index state to call next once
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions type, HTTPException class
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTPException extends Error with status property and optional response, use for auth failures or other fatal errors that should return HTTP response, getResponse creates new Response from exception
+- Copy-safe detail: Single class with status (defaults 500) and optional res, constructor accepts status, res, message, cause, getResponse returns Response with body from res if provided or from this.message and this.status
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client module entry point exporting hc client function, parseResponse response parser, DetailedError from utils, plus type exports
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports functions and types from ./client and ./utils, clean public API for HTTP client functionality
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class, ClientRequestImpl, ClientRequestImpl class, ClientRequestImpl
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, FormValue, ValidationTargets, serialize, UnionToIntersection, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, Client, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequestImpl, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, WebSocket
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ../utils/types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client implementation with hc function creating proxied request API, ClientRequestImpl class handles fetch with params/headers/body
+- Copy-safe detail: hc creates proxy wrapping callback, ClientRequestImpl stores url/method/buildSearchParams, fetch handles args validation, query/form/json body, headers with cookies, builds url with params, calls fetch with built options
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Response, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType
+- Internal names looked up: Hono, HonoBase, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, Schema, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, HonoRequest, ClientResponseOfEndpoint, InferEndpointType, InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ClientResponse, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, PickSchema, PathToChain, BuildSearch, BuildPath, TypedURL, IsLiteral, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, BuildPathname, HonoURL, ApplyParam, BuildTypedURL, ParseHostName, IsEmptyObject
+- Imports or neighbors: ./../hono, ./../hono-base, ./../router, ./types, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types, ./utils/cookie
+- Plain-English summary: Client module type definitions including HTTP type helpers, request/response type inference, schema extraction, URL path building, response filtering by status code
+- Copy-safe detail: Heavy type file with BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest with all HTTP methods, ClientResponse with body/status/headers/url methods, various type inference utilities (Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType), schema extraction utilities for client type construction
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, fetchRP, DetailedError, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ObjectType, DetailedError class, nullBodyResponses
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utilities for URL manipulation, query params, protocol switching, response parsing with status filtering
+- Copy-safe detail: mergePath joins base/path strings, replaceUrlParam substitutes path params into URL, buildSearchParams converts query object to URLSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol swaps http/ws or ws/http, removeIndexString strips /index from URL, deepMerge shallowly merges objects, parseResponse wraps fetchRP for type-safe error handling
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, fetchRP, DetailedError, detectResponseType response method, jsonRegex, DetailedError class
+- Plain-English summary: Parses fetch response, auto-detects JSON vs text by content-type, throws DetailedError for non-OK status, handles response data extraction
+- Copy-safe detail: fetchRP awaits response, checks for body and non-null status 101,204,205,304, auto-selects json/text based on content-type regex, sets response._data via appropriate getter, throws DetailedError if !ok, returns _data, DetailedError is named Error with detail/code/statuscode/log properties
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, HandleOptions, handle
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter, registers Hono app via addEventListener('fetch', handle(app, options)), sets up fetch event listener for Cloudflare Workers service worker
+- Copy-safe detail: fire function takes Hono app and HandleOptions, calls addEventListener for 'fetch' event with handle result handler function created from app
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function, HandleOptions type
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, Env, Schema, FetchEvent, FetchEvent, Handler, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch handler, calls app.fetch with evt.request and execution context, falls back to global fetch if first returns 404, returns async function that responds to fetch events
+- Copy-safe detail: handle takes Hono app and HandleOptions with optional fetch, returns function taking FetchEvent event, returns Promise that calls evt.respondWith with app.fetch result, passes evt.request and evt as parameters to app.fetch
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface, ExtendableEvent interface
+- Internal names looked up: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent, Event
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker event type definitions for FetchEvent and ExtendableEvent base class
+- Copy-safe detail: Two interfaces, ExtendableEvent adds waitUntil, FetchEvent extends with clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, resultingClientId properties plus respondWith method
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src
